tasks.title: Audit token terminology and plan safe migration
tasks.objective: Identify every meaningful token terminology reference and decide which should become credit, which need compatibility handling, and which are out of scope.
inputs: repository-wide search results for token terminology
authority: Classify references before editing to avoid unsafe blind replacement.
Preserve product behavior and data semantics.
Do not add feedback tasks to the main task ledger.
acceptance_criteria: The resolver has a concrete migration map for app code, tests, docs, planning artifacts, and feedback artifacts.
Compatibility risks are identified before code edits begin.
Out-of-scope references, if any, are explicitly justified.
verification: Run repository search for token/Token/TOKEN references and record remaining intentional cases.
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when the migration map is clear enough to perform scoped edits safely.

tasks.title: Rename app terminology from token to credit
tasks.objective: Update source code, UI copy, service/test names, and app-facing behavior so the application consistently uses credit terminology.
authority: Rename visible app terminology to credit/credits.
Rename internal identifiers where practical without breaking durable state compatibility.
Preserve create/show-interest costs, hold/consume/refund behavior, and ledger auditability.
acceptance_criteria: User-facing app pages no longer display token terminology.
Tests assert credit terminology for create, interest, dashboard, refund, and purchase-adjacent copy.
Ledger behavior remains unchanged except for terminology.
Any required compatibility alias is documented in code or issue notes.
verification: Run focused tests covering create, interest, dashboard, persistence ledger, and MVP verification.
tasks.area: app terminology, ledger naming, UI copy
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when the app uses credit terminology and behavioral verification passes.

tasks.title: Rename repository artifacts from token to credit
tasks.objective: Update repository documentation, planning artifacts, task ledgers, feedback artifacts, and knowledge index so non-app language consistently uses credit terminology.
authority: Update current repository language to credit terminology.
Preserve historical dates, issue IDs, task IDs, and factual evidence while changing product vocabulary.
Keep resolved feedback and knowledge-index guardrail consistency intact.
acceptance_criteria: Current docs and planning artifacts consistently describe credits instead of tokens.
Agent feedback and knowledge artifacts no longer use token terminology except for explicitly justified historical or compatibility notes.
`npm run check:workflow` passes after resolved feedback references are updated consistently.
Repository search shows no unintended token terminology remains.
verification: Run `npm run check` before issue closeout.
tasks.area: docs, planning, feedback workflow, knowledge index
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when repository artifacts consistently use credit terminology and workflow verification passes.
